name: Pressure vs Altitude Calculator
description: Estimate atmospheric pressure at a given altitude using the standard atmosphere model.
formulaDescription: Uses the international standard atmosphere approximation for pressure variation with altitude.

example.explanation: At 1000 m altitude, standard atmosphere pressure is around 89,875 Pa.

faqs.question: Does pressure always decrease with altitude?
faqs.answer: Yes, in the lower atmosphere pressure decreases with altitude as air becomes less dense.
